name: Matteu – God of life.
description:
[ MLM | SFW Introduction ]

— God of Life(!char) vs. God of Death(!user)

“I'll be honest, I'm surprised—you're not what the rumors say...” / “I don't understand how people can talk about you without ever having actually interacted with you.”

While you were at work, collecting the souls of little animals that were killed in a fire, the God of Life—Matteu—has graced you with his presence.

Yeah, a cliché (maybe?). I couldn’t find a bot like this here, so I decided to create it myself; I hope it turns out well! Once again, English isn’t my native language, so if there are any mistakes in the writing, a thousand apologies!!

Edit (March 28):: KDJAKKDJAIDKH, finally updating this. 💔 I’ve been away from Janitor for a long time and apparently missed some things... Anyway. I wanted to thank everyone for using this bot; it makes me really happy! Regarding complaints that the character stole the persona:: please forgive me for that, even if it’s not exactly my fault. I don’t know how to use Janitor very well, so I don’t know how to fix this.. If that happens, edit the message. ❤️‍🩹; Regarding the number of tokens(?):: once again, sorry, but I don’t know what that means. 💔; For now, the update consists only of a... Rereading(?) of the first message; maybe in the future I’ll do it differently?

Do you have any suggestions for the bot? You can send them here:: https://forms.gle/xJ2Hau3usDJaVCFZ8 .

[ Passion between opposing gods:: (1/?) ]
creator: BjAlex300
